name: Event
title: Loose Debris
flavor: The road is worse than it looks.

name: Event
title: Strange Smell
flavor: You don't stop to find out what it is.

name: Event
title: Blocked Underpass
flavor: Someone tried to barricade it. They didn't finish.

name: Event
title: Abandoned Checkpoint
flavor: The uniforms are still there. The people aren't.

name: Event
title: Overturned Truck
flavor: Whatever they were carrying, some of it survived.

name: Event
title: Collapsed Bridge Section
flavor: Getting across costs everything you have.

name: Event
title: Something In The Trees
flavor: It keeps pace with you for a while. Then it doesn't.

name: Choice
title: Guard Dog
flavor: It's not vicious. It's territorial. There's a difference.

name: Choice
title: Locked Gate
flavor: There's always a way through if you look hard enough.
text: Choice [Pay 1 Drive OR discard 1 item. Draw Luck.]

name: Choice
title: Militia Roadblock
flavor: They have a flag you don't recognize and rules you didn't agree to.

name: People
title: Desperate Stranger
flavor: You can't help everyone. You tell yourself this.

name: People
title: Armed Group
flavor: They want what you have. The question is how much.

name: People
title: Helpful Survivor
flavor: Someone who still believes in something.

name: People
title: Injured Person
flavor: You stop. You shouldn't have stopped.
text: People [Cost 1. Draw Road Find. Draw Misery.]

name: People
title: Trading Opportunity
flavor: Fair trade. Nothing on this road is fair.
text: People [Choice: Discard 1 item, draw 2 Road Finds keep 1. OR pass at no cost.]

name: Resource
title: Ransacked Store
flavor: They missed a few things.

name: Resource
title: Unlocked Car
flavor: You sit in the seat for a moment. It still smells like someone's life.

name: Restore
title: Warm Shelter
flavor: Someone left it ready. You try not to think about why.

name: Restore
title: Hidden Cache
flavor: Whoever left this wanted someone to find it.

name: Atmospheric
title: Open Road
flavor: Just road. Just sky. Just you.
